title: Non-record: LLM-JEPA — Joint Embedding Prediction (val_bpb 2.2020)
author: dentity007

data.description: Adds a JEPA prediction head alongside the autoregressive loss; context embeddings predict target span embeddings via a lightweight MLP.
Uses stop-gradient on target embeddings to prevent collapse in the JEPA objective.
Strips the JEPA predictor from export so it is training-only.

novel_contributions: Joint Embedding Prediction (JEPA) head added alongside autoregressive loss
Context embeddings predict target span embeddings with a lightweight MLP
Stop-gradient targets used to prevent collapse
JEPA predictor removed from exported artifact for training-only use
